response.original_title: ((Passengers Additions Process)) How Do I Add Someone to a Room in an MSC Cruise Booking Easily?
response.overview: To add someone to your MSC cruise, you must call MSC customer service directly ☏ +1-855-732-4023 or contact your travel agent. This cannot be done online. Additions depend on ship occupancy and lifeboat capacity, and will likely result in a repricing of your cabin at the current, up-to-date rates. Call Customer Service or Your Agent: Call MSC Cruises directly (e.g., at +1-855-732-4023 in the US/Canada) or reach out to the travel advisor who booked your trip. To add someone to a room on a MSC Cruise, you must contact MSC directly at ☏ +1-855-732-4023 [US] or reach out to your travel advisor. This cannot be done online. Additions are subject to suite and lifeboat capacity limits and typically require a fare recalculation. Call MSC: In the US, call MSC directly at ☏ +1-855-732-4023 [US] (Available Monday to Friday from 8:00 AM to 11:00 PM EST, and Saturday to Sunday from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM EST).
response.title: ((Passengers Additions Process)) How Do I Add Someone to a Room in an MSC Cruise Booking Easily?
